name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech in Computer Science, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 - Present)

projects.name: Career Ops - AI-Powered Job Application Agent
projects.description: An end-to-end FastAPI job discovery platform aggregating opportunities from 40+ portals and using Gemini and Pydantic to match candidates.

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: A hybrid CNN-LSTM with attention mechanism designed to classify clinical EEG data with high accuracy, visualized using Grad-CAM.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: A voice-controlled terminal translating natural language into shell commands using Google Generative AI, published on PyPI.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Real-time face recognition authentication system using OpenCV linked to a TensorFlow NLP chatbot with speech-to-text features.
